message:
fix(missions): consistent count between AI Missions list and chat views (#6142)

The mission sidebar list view applies filters (isActiveMission excludes
completed/failed/cancelled, and saved missions are a separate section),
but the chat view's 'Back to missions' button used the unfiltered
missions.length. This produced off-by-N mismatches such as the list
header reading '21 missions' while the chat header read '24 missions'.

Introduce listTotalMissions = savedMissions.length + activeMissions.length
as the single source of truth for what the list actually renders, and
use it for the chat view's back button so both views agree.

Also clarifies why users may observe fewer than MISSIONS_PAGE_SIZE (20)
items on initial load: the count reflects the filter applied, not a
pagination bug. MISSIONS_PAGE_SIZE remains 20 and Load More continues
to render when hasMoreMissions is true.

Fixes #6134
Fixes #6135
Fixes #6136
Fixes #6137

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
